mapper.select: SELECT id, email, password_hash, name, phone, role, oauth_provider, oauth_id, profile_image_file_id, status, language, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM users WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT id, email, password_hash, name, phone, role, oauth_provider, oauth_id, profile_image_file_id, status, language, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM users WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users ( email, password_hash, name, phone, role ) VALUES ( #{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{role} )
